title: NP postcode area

infobox.key: [Postcode area](/wiki/List_of_postcode_areas_in_the_United_Kingdom "List of postcode areas in the United Kingdom")
[Postcode districts](/wiki/List_of_postcode_districts_in_the_United_Kingdom "List of postcode districts in the United Kingdom")

infobox.value: [Post town](/wiki/Post_town "Post town") | Coverage | Local authority area(s)

PONTYPOOL | [Pontypool](/wiki/Pontypool "Pontypool"), [Blaenavon](/wiki/Blaenavon "Blaenavon"), [Little Mill](/wiki/Little_Mill,_Monmouthshire "Little Mill, Monmouthshire"), [Griffithstown](/wiki/Griffithstown "Griffithstown"), parts of [Glascoed](/wiki/Glascoed "Glascoed") | [Torfaen](/wiki/Torfaen "Torfaen"), [Monmouthshire](/wiki/Monmouthshire "Monmouthshire")

NEWPORT | Western Newport, including [Bassaleg](/wiki/Bassaleg "Bassaleg"), [Duffryn](/wiki/Duffryn "Duffryn"), [Rogerstone](/wiki/Rogerstone "Rogerstone"), [Coedkernew](/wiki/Coedkernew "Coedkernew"), [St Brides](/wiki/St_Brides_Wentloog "St Brides Wentloog") | Newport

NEWPORT | North-western Newport, including: [Abercarn](/wiki/Abercarn "Abercarn"), [Crumlin](/wiki/Crumlin,_Caerphilly "Crumlin, Caerphilly"), [Cwmfelinfach](/wiki/Cwmfelinfach "Cwmfelinfach"), [Risca](/wiki/Risca "Risca"), [Ynysddu](/wiki/Ynysddu "Ynysddu") | [Caerphilly](/wiki/Caerphilly_(county_borough) "Caerphilly (county borough)")

CHEPSTOW | [Chepstow](/wiki/Chepstow "Chepstow"), [Sedbury](/wiki/Sedbury "Sedbury"), [Beachley](/wiki/Beachley "Beachley") | Monmouthshire, [Forest of Dean](/wiki/Forest_of_Dean_(district) "Forest of Dean (district)")

NEWPORT | Eastern Newport, including [Caerleon](/wiki/Caerleon "Caerleon"), [Langstone](/wiki/Langstone,_Newport "Langstone, Newport"), [Llanwern](/wiki/Llanwern "Llanwern"), [Nash](/wiki/Nash,_Newport "Nash, Newport"), [Llandegveth](/wiki/Llandegveth "Llandegveth") [Underwood](/wiki/Underwood,_Newport "Underwood, Newport") | Newport, Monmouthshire, Torfaen

NEWPORT | Eastern and East Central Newport, including: [Beechwood](/wiki/Beechwood,_Newport "Beechwood, Newport"), [Maindee](/wiki/Maindee "Maindee"), [St. Julians](/wiki/St._Julian%27s,_Newport "St. Julian's, Newport"), [Ringland](/wiki/Ringland,_Newport "Ringland, Newport") | Newport

NEWPORT | Western and West Central Newport, including: [City centre](/wiki/Newport_city_centre "Newport city centre"), [Pill](/wiki/Pillgwenlly "Pillgwenlly"), [Maesglas](/wiki/Maesglas "Maesglas"), [Crindau](/wiki/Crindau "Crindau"), [Malpas](/wiki/Malpas,_Newport "Malpas, Newport"), [Bettws](/wiki/Bettws,_Newport "Bettws, Newport") | Newport
EBBW VALE | [Ebbw Vale](/wiki/Ebbw_Vale "Ebbw Vale"), [Brynmawr](/wiki/Brynmawr "Brynmawr"), [Cwm](/wiki/Cwm,_Blaenau_Gwent "Cwm, Blaenau Gwent") | Blaenau Gwent

MONMOUTH | [Monmouth](/wiki/Monmouth "Monmouth"), [Wyesham](/wiki/Wyesham "Wyesham"), [Redbrook](/wiki/Redbrook "Redbrook"), [Welsh Newton](/wiki/Welsh_Newton "Welsh Newton") | Monmouthshire, Forest of Dean, Herefordshire

CALDICOT | [Caldicot](/wiki/Caldicot,_Monmouthshire "Caldicot, Monmouthshire"), [Magor](/wiki/Magor,_Monmouthshire "Magor, Monmouthshire"), [Newport](/wiki/Newport,_Wales "Newport, Wales") | Monmouthshire, Newport

["ONS Postcode Directory Version Notes"](http://www.ons.gov.uk/ons/guide-method/geography/products/postcode-directories/-nspp-/onspd-user-guide-and-version-notes.zip) (ZIP). *National Statistics Postcode Products*. [Office for National Statistics](/wiki/Office_for_National_Statistics "Office for National Statistics"). May 2020. Table 2. Retrieved 19 June 2020. Coordinates from mean of unit postcode points, ["Code-Point Open"](http://www.ordnancesurvey.co.uk/oswebsite/products/code-point-open/). *OS OpenData*. [Ordnance Survey](/wiki/Ordnance_Survey "Ordnance Survey"). February 2012. Retrieved 21 April 2012.

**Postcode district boundaries**:

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Postcode area within the United Kingdom

[Template:Attached KML/NP postcode area](/wiki/Template:Attached_KML/NP_postcode_area "Template:Attached KML/NP postcode area")

KML is from Wikidata

Postcode area in United Kingdom

| Newport | |
| --- | --- |
| [Postcode area](/wiki/List_of_postcode_areas_in_the_United_Kingdom "List of postcode areas in the United Kingdom") | |
| [NP is located in the United Kingdom](/wiki/File:United_Kingdom_adm_location_map.svg "NP is located in the United Kingdom") NP  NP | |
| Coordinates: [51°41′06″N 3°01′08″W﻿ / ﻿51.685°N 3.019°W﻿ / 51.685; -3.019](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=NP_postcode_area&params=51.685_N_3.019_W_type:city_region:GB) | |
| Country | United Kingdom |
| [Postcode area](/wiki/List_of_postcode_areas_in_the_United_Kingdom "List of postcode areas in the United Kingdom") | NP |
| Postcode area name | Newport |
| [Post towns](/wiki/Post_town "Post town") | 14 |
| [Postcode districts](/wiki/List_of_postcode_districts_in_the_United_Kingdom "List of postcode districts in the United Kingdom") | 25 |

| Postcodes (total) | 30,399 |
| Statistics as at May 2020[[1]](#cite_note-1) | |

The **NP postcode area**, also known as the **Newport postcode area**,[[2]](#cite_note-2) is a group of eighteen postcode districts, which are subdivisions of fourteen post towns. These cover south-east Wales, including [Newport](/wiki/Newport,_Wales "Newport, Wales"), [Pontypool](/wiki/Pontypool "Pontypool"), [Abergavenny](/wiki/Abergavenny "Abergavenny"), [Monmouth](/wiki/Monmouth "Monmouth"), [Chepstow](/wiki/Chepstow "Chepstow"), [Abertillery](/wiki/Abertillery "Abertillery"), [Usk](/wiki/Usk "Usk"), [Tredegar](/wiki/Tredegar "Tredegar"), [New Tredegar](/wiki/New_Tredegar "New Tredegar"), [Ebbw Vale](/wiki/Ebbw_Vale "Ebbw Vale"), [Crickhowell](/wiki/Crickhowell "Crickhowell"), [Blackwood](/wiki/Blackwood,_Caerphilly "Blackwood, Caerphilly"), [Caldicot](/wiki/Caldicot,_Monmouthshire "Caldicot, Monmouthshire") and [Cwmbran](/wiki/Cwmbran "Cwmbran"), plus a small part of the English counties of [Gloucestershire](/wiki/Gloucestershire "Gloucestershire") and [Herefordshire](/wiki/Herefordshire "Herefordshire").

## Coverage

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=NP_postcode_area&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Coverage")]

The approximate coverage of the postcode districts:

| NP4 | PONTYPOOL | [Pontypool](/wiki/Pontypool "Pontypool"), [Blaenavon](/wiki/Blaenavon "Blaenavon"), [Little Mill](/wiki/Little_Mill,_Monmouthshire "Little Mill, Monmouthshire"), [Griffithstown](/wiki/Griffithstown "Griffithstown"), parts of [Glascoed](/wiki/Glascoed "Glascoed") | [Torfaen](/wiki/Torfaen "Torfaen"), [Monmouthshire](/wiki/Monmouthshire "Monmouthshire") |
| NP7 | ABERGAVENNY | [Abergavenny](/wiki/Abergavenny "Abergavenny") | Monmouthshire, [Herefordshire](/wiki/Herefordshire "Herefordshire"), [Powys](/wiki/Powys "Powys") |
| NP8 | CRICKHOWELL | [Crickhowell](/wiki/Crickhowell "Crickhowell"), Ffawyddog | Powys |
| NP10 | NEWPORT | Western Newport, including [Bassaleg](/wiki/Bassaleg "Bassaleg"), [Duffryn](/wiki/Duffryn "Duffryn"), [Rogerstone](/wiki/Rogerstone "Rogerstone"), [Coedkernew](/wiki/Coedkernew "Coedkernew"), [St Brides](/wiki/St_Brides_Wentloog "St Brides Wentloog") | Newport |
| NP11 | NEWPORT | North-western Newport, including: [Abercarn](/wiki/Abercarn "Abercarn"), [Crumlin](/wiki/Crumlin,_Caerphilly "Crumlin, Caerphilly"), [Cwmfelinfach](/wiki/Cwmfelinfach "Cwmfelinfach"), [Risca](/wiki/Risca "Risca"), [Ynysddu](/wiki/Ynysddu "Ynysddu") | [Caerphilly](/wiki/Caerphilly_(county_borough) "Caerphilly (county borough)") |
| NP12 | BLACKWOOD | [Blackwood](/wiki/Blackwood,_Caerphilly "Blackwood, Caerphilly"), [Pontllanfraith](/wiki/Pontllanfraith "Pontllanfraith"), [Wyllie](/wiki/Wyllie,_Caerphilly "Wyllie, Caerphilly") | Caerphilly |
| NP13 | ABERTILLERY | [Abertillery](/wiki/Abertillery "Abertillery") | [Blaenau Gwent](/wiki/Blaenau_Gwent "Blaenau Gwent") |
| NP15 | USK | [Usk](/wiki/Usk "Usk"), [Raglan](/wiki/Raglan,_Monmouthshire "Raglan, Monmouthshire") | Monmouthshire |
| NP16 | CHEPSTOW | [Chepstow](/wiki/Chepstow "Chepstow"), [Sedbury](/wiki/Sedbury "Sedbury"), [Beachley](/wiki/Beachley "Beachley") | Monmouthshire, [Forest of Dean](/wiki/Forest_of_Dean_(district) "Forest of Dean (district)") |
| NP18 | NEWPORT | Eastern Newport, including [Caerleon](/wiki/Caerleon "Caerleon"), [Langstone](/wiki/Langstone,_Newport "Langstone, Newport"), [Llanwern](/wiki/Llanwern "Llanwern"), [Nash](/wiki/Nash,_Newport "Nash, Newport"), [Llandegveth](/wiki/Llandegveth "Llandegveth") [Underwood](/wiki/Underwood,_Newport "Underwood, Newport") | Newport, Monmouthshire, Torfaen |
| NP19 | NEWPORT | Eastern and East Central Newport, including: [Beechwood](/wiki/Beechwood,_Newport "Beechwood, Newport"), [Maindee](/wiki/Maindee "Maindee"), [St. Julians](/wiki/St._Julian%27s,_Newport "St. Julian's, Newport"), [Ringland](/wiki/Ringland,_Newport "Ringland, Newport") | Newport |
| NP20 | NEWPORT | Western and West Central Newport, including: [City centre](/wiki/Newport_city_centre "Newport city centre"), [Pill](/wiki/Pillgwenlly "Pillgwenlly"), [Maesglas](/wiki/Maesglas "Maesglas"), [Crindau](/wiki/Crindau "Crindau"), [Malpas](/wiki/Malpas,_Newport "Malpas, Newport"), [Bettws](/wiki/Bettws,_Newport "Bettws, Newport") | Newport |
| NP22 | TREDEGAR | [Tredegar](/wiki/Tredegar "Tredegar"), [Rhymney](/wiki/Rhymney "Rhymney") | Blaenau Gwent, Caerphilly |
| NP23 | EBBW VALE | [Ebbw Vale](/wiki/Ebbw_Vale "Ebbw Vale"), [Brynmawr](/wiki/Brynmawr "Brynmawr"), [Cwm](/wiki/Cwm,_Blaenau_Gwent "Cwm, Blaenau Gwent") | Blaenau Gwent |
| NP24 | NEW TREDEGAR | [New Tredegar](/wiki/New_Tredegar "New Tredegar") | Caerphilly |

| NP44 | CWMBRAN | [Cwmbran](/wiki/Cwmbran "Cwmbran") | Torfaen |
| NP90 | NEWPORT | Newport | Newport |
